title: Live staged extract live LLM opt-in proof (per-step)
problem: Staged spine uses mock LLM for extract after live OpenAlex ingest. Pre-ticket-203 GO defines a per-step live Ollama extract proof on rank-1 staged source without changing orchestrator defaults.
acceptance_criteria: Live staged extract fallthrough bypasses staged-fetch auto-mock when env gate set.
Opt-in pytest (live_network + live_smoke) proves discover→ingest→live extract on temp DB.
Default pytest and staged orchestrator remain mock-only.
rollback_plan: Revert fallthrough gate, test, and ci deselect entry.
category: Phase 3 / live LLM / staged spine product-risk
